title: nepeta nervosa
intro: Nepeta nervosa, also known as catmint, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antispasmodic, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The health benefits of Nepeta nervosa include its ability to calm the nervous system, promote relaxation, and improve sleep quality. Nepeta nervosa can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
